# timing

**Instance Property**

Timing information of the sample.

## Declaration

```swift
var timing: CMSampleTimingInfo
```

## Discussion

Set to [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMSampleTimingInfo/invalid] if unknown. Individual fields may be set to [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMTime/invalid] if unknown.
title: timing
